song.title: The Awakening
song.albumTitle: Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical)
song.description: Full lyrics to 'The Awakening' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: The Awakening Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
og.description: Opening track from Swipe Me to the Moon. 'Oh yeah, I'm gay and I own this ride.'

twitter.title: The Awakening Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
twitter.description: Oh yeah, I'm gay and I own this ride. I've been closeted for years, now I'm gay with pride.

essay: The Awakening is the coming-out ignition point of Swipe Me to the Moon, where fear gives way to joy. It establishes the album's central promise: queer self-recognition can be ecstatic, not tragic.

The lyrics paint a vivid picture of queer joy — drag brunches, Berlin karaoke bars, crying at Pixar — before landing with a perfect comic twist: now that he knows who he is, he urgently needs a date. It sets up the entire musical's dating-app journey with humor and heart.
song.lyricsHtml:
Okay
So I've been thinking
Like really thinking
And I think I might be
No, I know I'm

Oh yeah, I'm gay
And I love it babe
Like a rainbow on a rocket ship
With glitter on my grave

I love boys in eyeliner
And boys in big ol' boots
I love soft ones, sweet ones
And mean ones in expensive suits

Oh yeah, I'm gay and I own this ride
I've been closeted for years, now I'm gay with pride
I wanna kiss, I wanna dance, I wanna text you up
Then bake banana bread and spoon like pups

It took me years to feel this free
To say it out loud and finally be me
So if you're out there somewhere someday
Know this little boy found joy
When he found out he was gay

Oh yeah, I'm gay and I love it babe
From drag brunches to awkward dates
From karaoke in Berlin bars
To crying at Pixar under the stars

Wait
Holy fuck

I need a date
Yesterday
